title: Night of your birth
notes: Father's voice, the Leonid meteor shower. Second-person address, fragmented syntax. Cosmological imagery — stars, holes in the heavens.
text: Night of your birth. Thirty-three. The Leonids they were called. God how the stars did fall. I looked for blackness, holes in the heavens. The Dipper stove.

sentences.text: God how the stars did fall.
I looked for blackness, holes in the heavens.
